title: Somnol's Red Diamonds!
description: Anything with a diamond-related texture now has a red hue
body:
Anything with a diamond-related texture now has a red hue! This includes:

-  Ore / Deepslate Ore / Block
-  Tools / Weapons
-  Player / Horse / Nautilus Armor
-  Trims
-  Overworld Model Textures
-  Enchant Table

If you have any questions, feel free to dm me on my discord: atomicdasloth
